GrandeOS
version 1.0 💖
Made with love for my sister, the biggest Ariana Grande fan I know. Every color, every app, and every song, all for her. 🌸
"thank u, next" but like, thank u for using this 💕
built with HTML, CSS & JavaScript
no frameworks, just vibes
🔔 Notifications
💖 Welcome to GrandeOS!
🎶 Eternal Sunshine is out now
🌸 Petal is coming soon - her next album!
🎀 AG tour announcement dropping soon

time is up!
💖 Welcome to GrandeOS!
💖
Welcome to GrandeOS
Your personal Ariana Grande themed operating system. Built with love, just for you. 🌸
Tap Next to learn what everything does
🎶
Music Player
Now Playing - see the album art, progress bar, and controls just like Spotify
Albums - browse all 7 albums, click to expand and see every song
Queue - see every song in order, click any to play it
Music plays when hosted online 🌐
🖼️
Wallpapers
Go to Settings (⚙️) and click Wallpaper to choose from all 7 Ariana eras as your desktop background.
🌙 Yours Truly · 🔥 My Everything · 🌊 Dangerous Woman
🍭 Sweetener · 💔 Thank U Next · 💜 Positions · ☀️ Eternal Sunshine
You can also right-click the desktop to switch!
🗂️
All Your Apps
📅 Calendar
Add events, monthly + yearly view
☁️ Journal
Write diary entries + sticky notes
✅ To-Do
Keep track of your tasks
🕐 Clock
Stopwatch + countdown timer
⛅ Weather
Real weather for any city
🎨 Paint
Draw & save as PNG
👗 Outfit
Build Ariana-inspired outfits
🍵 Fortune
Get an Ariana fortune cookie
✨
Tips & Tricks
🖱️ Drag any window by its title bar to move it
Resize from any corner - drag the edges
🟡 Minimise a window with the yellow button
🟢 Maximise a window with the green button
⚙️ Settings - change fonts, theme & wallpaper
🌸
You're all set!
This OS was made just for you with love. Enjoy every bit of it, from the music to the journal to the little fortune cookies. 💖
"just keep breathin'"
